name: Tortellini with Sun-Dried Tomatoes and Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss sliced green onions, thyme, savory, parsley, garlic, chives, salt, pepper, and olive oil in a bowl. Let stand for 30 minutes.
2. To prepare sun-dried tomatoes, cover them with boiling water and let sit for 2 minutes. Drain, then slice thinly crosswise. Set aside.
3. Cook tortellini in a large pot of boiling water until it rises to the surface. Drain and toss with half of the herb mixture. Keep warm.
4. Slice the squash thinly crosswise. In a nonstick skillet, heat the remaining herb mixture over medium heat. Add the tomatoes and squash, cooking for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add vegetable broth and simmer over low heat for 2 minutes. Toss the vegetables with the pasta and serve immediately.
6. Garnish with fresh nasturtium flowers and leaves (well cleaned).
